turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Hi po, I got a bank referral and I am interested in coverage for my family. Pwede malaman options?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Sige po. Para ma-check ang tamang coverage, ito po ba ay for yourself, family protection, o pagdagdag ng beneficiary or rider?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Family protection po, mostly for my wife and child.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Noted po. For family protection, we can discuss coverage amount, beneficiary details, and optional riders like accident or critical illness coverage.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Gusto ko pong kumuha ng insurance para sa pamilya ko.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Sige po. Para malaman ang tamang coverage, ito po ba ay para sa sarili, family protection, o pagdagdag ng benepisyaryo?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Para po sa asawa ko ang beneficiary.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Opo. Maaari po nating i-note na asawa ninyo ang beneficiary at i-check ang coverage amount na babagay sa pangangailangan ninyo.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I want to renew my policy and confirm the premium amount.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Yes, I can help with that. To keep the policy active, the premium should be paid before the due date. I can help confirm the amount and payment option.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, please continue.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Sure. I will check the renewal details and guide you through the available payment options.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Selamat siang Ibu, cicilan saya jatuh tempo besok kan?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Baik Bapak/Ibu. Cicilan atau angsuran perlu dibayarkan sebelum tanggal jatuh tempo agar tidak muncul denda keterlambatan.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Baik, saya akan bayar hari ini.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Terima kasih Bapak/Ibu. Jika sudah dibayar, mohon simpan bukti pembayaran untuk referensi.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Untuk pengajuan pembiayaan, DP minimal dan tenor berapa?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Untuk pengajuan pembiayaan, biasanya perlu informasi DP, tenor yang diinginkan, data kendaraan atau barang, dan dokumen identitas.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Saya ingin tenor dua tahun.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Baik Bapak/Ibu. Tenor dua tahun bisa dicatat untuk simulasi awal, lalu tim terkait dapat mengecek kelayakan sesuai data pengajuan.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Mahal po yung premium, wala akong budget ngayon.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Gets ko po na importante ang budget. Pwede nating tingnan ang lower premium option o i-adjust ang riders para sakto pa rin ang coverage.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Ayoko po mawala totally ang coverage.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Tama po. Ang goal natin ay mapanatili ang useful coverage habang ina-adjust ang premium sa mas kaya ninyong budget.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Referred ako ng bank, pero hindi ako sure kung legit ba itong insurance offer.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Valid po yung concern ninyo. I can explain the coverage basics and, if needed, connect you with a licensed advisor to verify the offer details.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Ayoko po magbigay agad ng personal details.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Okay lang po. Hindi po tayo dapat manghingi ng sensitive details unless kailangan na sa official application step.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Hindi ko po alam kung kailangan ko pa ng insurance.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Naiintindihan ko po. Ang life insurance ay karaniwang ginagamit para may proteksyon ang pamilya kung may mangyari sa policy owner.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Paano kung may savings naman ako?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Maganda po na may savings. Ang insurance naman ay ibang klase ng proteksyon, kaya mas mabuting i-review ito kasama ang licensed advisor.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Dendanya kok mahal banget kalau telat sedikit?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Saya paham keberatannya. Denda biasanya mengikuti ketentuan pembiayaan kalau pembayaran lewat jatuh tempo.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Bisa dikurangi gak?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Saya tidak bisa menjanjikan pengurangan denda, tapi saya bisa bantu catat keluhan dan arahkan ke petugas terkait.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Tenor yang ditawarkan terlalu pendek, cicilannya jadi berat.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Baik Bapak/Ibu. Tenor memang mempengaruhi besaran cicilan. Saya bisa catat preferensi tenor yang lebih panjang untuk simulasi pembiayaan.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Saya ingin cicilan bulanan lebih ringan.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Dipahami. Kita bisa cek opsi tenor dan DP yang sesuai, tetapi keputusan akhir tetap mengikuti hasil penilaian pembiayaan.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Hi po, I got a bank referral and I want to know the coverage options.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Sige po. Since galing ito sa bank referral, I can explain the coverage options and ask a few questions para ma-match sa needs ninyo.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I want family coverage with a rider if possible.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Noted po. We can check family protection coverage and possible riders like accident or critical illness add-ons.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: My premium is due next week po. What happens if ma-lapse yung policy?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Para hindi po ma-lapse ang coverage, kailangan mabayaran ang premium before the due date.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Can I still pay after the due date?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Pwede po nating i-check ang policy rules, pero ayokong manghula. I can connect you to an advisor for exact grace-period details.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Pwede bang mag-add ng critical illness rider and change beneficiary later?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Pwede po nating i-discuss ang rider options at beneficiary update process, pero depende po ito sa policy rules.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, explain the rider first.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Ang rider po ay add-on coverage, for example accident or critical illness protection, na maaaring idagdag sa base policy.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Aku belum bisa bayar cicilan, bisa reschedule gak?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Saya paham. Kalau lagi belum bisa bayar, saya bisa bantu catat kendalanya dan ajukan callback untuk opsi bantuan.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Aku butuh waktu sampai minggu depan.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Baik, saya catat kendalanya. Tim terkait dapat menghubungi untuk membahas opsi yang tersedia sesuai ketentuan.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Kalau DP kecil, tenor bisa diperpanjang atau tidak?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: DP dan tenor dapat mempengaruhi simulasi pembiayaan. Kita perlu cek nominal DP, jangka waktu, dan data barang atau kendaraan.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Saya mau tenor tiga tahun.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Baik Bapak/Ibu. Tenor tiga tahun bisa dicatat untuk simulasi, lalu hasilnya tetap mengikuti penilaian pembiayaan.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Parang mahal eh, kaya ba gawing mas mababa yung hulog?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Gets ko po. Pwede nating tingnan kung may lower premium option or rider adjustment para mas manageable ang hulog.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Basta wag sana mawala lahat ng coverage.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Opo, ang goal po ay hindi basta mawala ang useful coverage habang ina-adjust ang premium.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Busy po ako ngayon, tawag na lang ulit mamaya.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: No problem po. I can schedule a callback. Anong oras po mas convenient?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Mga 6 PM po.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Noted po, 6 PM callback. I will mark that time for follow-up.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Yung asawa ko sana ilagay na tatanggap ng benefit.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Opo, ibig sabihin po ay asawa ninyo ang beneficiary. Maaari po nating i-note iyon para sa policy discussion.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Pwede rin ba anak ko?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Pwede po itong itanong sa advisor para masigurong tama ang beneficiary setup ayon sa policy rules.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Aku gak bisa bayar cicilan bulan ini, lagi berat banget.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Saya paham. Kalau lagi belum bisa bayar, saya bisa bantu catat kendalanya dan ajukan callback untuk opsi bantuan.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Jangan langsung ditagih keras ya.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Saya catat kekhawatiran itu. Tim terkait tetap akan mengikuti prosedur yang berlaku.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Udah telat nih, kena denda berapa ya?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Kalau lewat jatuh tempo, biasanya bisa kena denda sesuai aturan pembiayaan. Saya bisa bantu arahkan cara bayarnya.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Aku mau bayar sekarang.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Baik, silakan gunakan kanal pembayaran resmi dan simpan bukti pembayarannya.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Can I talk to a human advisor instead?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Opo, i-connect ko po kayo sa licensed advisor para maayos na masagot ang policy at coverage questions ninyo.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Yes, please connect me.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Noted po. I will route this to an advisor for proper assistance.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Pwede po ba akong kumausap ng totoong tao?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Opo, ikokonekta ko po kayo sa licensed advisor para maayos na masagot ang policy at coverage questions ninyo.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Salamat po.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Walang anuman po. Ipapasa ko po ang request ninyo sa advisor.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I want to complain po, can I speak to a supervisor?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Opo, I can route this to the right support or advisor team. I will not guess on complaint handling details.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Please do that.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Noted po. I will mark this as an escalation request.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Saya mau bicara dengan CS manusia.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Baik, saya akan arahkan ke petugas agar pertanyaan Bapak/Ibu ditangani langsung.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Tolong segera ya.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Baik Bapak/Ibu, saya catat permintaan ini untuk ditindaklanjuti oleh petugas.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Aku mau ngomong sama petugas collection aja.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Baik, saya bantu arahkan ke petugas ya supaya bisa ditangani langsung.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Iya, jangan bot lagi.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Baik, saya catat bahwa Anda ingin dibantu langsung oleh petugas.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Nggih mbak, kulo mboten bisa bayar angsuran minggu niki, nopo bisa dibantu?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Nggih, saya paham. Kalau sedang belum bisa bayar, saya bantu catat kendalanya dan ajukan callback dari tim terkait.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Matur nuwun, mbak.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Sami-sami. Saya catat kendala pembayaran panjenengan untuk tindak lanjut.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Nggih, jatuh tempo angsuran kulo niku dinten menopo?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Nggih Bapak/Ibu, saya bantu arahkan. Angsuran perlu dibayar sebelum jatuh tempo supaya mboten kena denda keterlambatan.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Nopo saged dibayar lewat kanal online?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Nggih, pembayaran sebaiknya dilakukan lewat kanal resmi. Mohon simpan bukti pembayaran setelah transaksi.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Mboten sengaja telat, dendane saged dihapus nopo mboten?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Nggih, saya paham. Kalau lewat jatuh tempo bisa ada denda sesuai ketentuan pembiayaan. Saya tidak bisa menjanjikan penghapusan denda.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Terus pripun?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Saya bisa bantu catat kendalanya dan arahkan ke petugas terkait untuk pengecekan lebih lanjut.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Kulo badhe reschedule pembayaran, sak meniko durung saged bayar.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Nggih, saya paham. Saya bantu catat permintaan reschedule dan kendala pembayaran untuk callback dari tim terkait.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Nggih, minggu ngajeng saged.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Baik, saya catat estimasi minggu depan untuk tindak lanjut, tetapi keputusan tetap mengikuti ketentuan pembiayaan.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Nggih, kulo pengin ngomong kalih petugas mawon.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Nggih, saya bantu arahkan ke petugas supaya bisa ditangani langsung.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Matur nuwun.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Sami-sami. Saya catat permintaan panjenengan untuk dibantu petugas.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Hindi ko mababayaran yung premium this week. Ma-lapse ba agad yung policy?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Pasensya na po sa situation. Para hindi tayo manghula, I can help check the payment option and connect you to an advisor for exact grace-period rules.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: May chance pa ba ma-keep yung coverage?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Possible po depende sa policy rules, pero kailangan po itong ma-confirm ng advisor or official policy details.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Kulang po ang pera ko ngayon para sa hulog ng policy.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Naiintindihan ko po. Pwede po nating tingnan ang mas mababang premium option o ipakausap kayo sa advisor para sa tamang options.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Ayoko po sanang maputol ang coverage.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Opo, importanteng ma-check ang due date at policy rules para maiwasan ang pagkaputol ng coverage.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Can I pay my premium online po? Ayoko pumunta sa branch.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Pwede po nating i-check ang available payment options. Please use only official payment channels and avoid sharing sensitive details in chat.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, what should I prepare?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Prepare your policy reference if required, but only enter details on the official payment page or through an authorized advisor.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Saya belum bisa bayar cicilan bulan ini karena penghasilan turun.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Saya mengerti. Saya bisa catat kendala pembayaran dan bantu arahkan ke opsi bantuan atau jadwal callback dari tim terkait.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Saya ingin dibantu sebelum jatuh tempo.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Baik Bapak/Ibu. Saya catat permintaan bantuan sebelum tanggal jatuh tempo.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Bisa minta keringanan gak? Aku lagi belum bisa bayar angsuran penuh.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Saya paham. Saya tidak bisa menjanjikan keringanan, tapi saya bisa bantu catat kendala dan ajukan callback dari tim terkait.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Yang penting jangan kena denda dulu.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Saya mengerti, tetapi denda mengikuti ketentuan pembiayaan. Sebaiknya segera cek opsi resmi sebelum jatuh tempo.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Guaranteed ba na kikita ako dito sa insurance policy?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Pasensya na po, ayokong manghula or mag-guarantee. Life insurance benefits depend on the policy terms, so I can connect you to a licensed advisor.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: So hindi guaranteed?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Hindi po ako dapat mag-confirm without the exact policy details. Best po na licensed advisor ang mag-explain ng benefits and risks.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: May sakit po ako, sabihin ko na lang ba na wala para ma-approve?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Pasensya na po, hindi ako makakatulong sa maling disclosure. Kailangan pong tama ang health information sa application.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Baka kasi hindi ako ma-approve.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Naiintindihan ko po, pero mas ligtas na kausapin ang licensed advisor para tama ang proseso at policy details.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Pwede ko bang palitan yung beneficiary without telling the policy owner?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Pasensya na po, I cannot advise on changes without proper authorization. Beneficiary changes must follow policy owner and insurer rules.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Kailangan talaga authorized?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Opo, dapat official and authorized ang process. I can connect you to an advisor for the correct steps.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Bisa bantu hapus denda saya tanpa proses resmi?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Maaf, saya tidak bisa membantu penghapusan denda di luar proses resmi. Saya bisa arahkan ke petugas untuk pengecekan sesuai ketentuan.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Kalau saya minta langsung saja?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Tetap harus mengikuti prosedur resmi Bapak/Ibu. Saya bisa bantu catat permintaan untuk ditinjau oleh tim terkait.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Gimana caranya biar gak usah bayar cicilan tapi akun tetap aman?

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Maaf, saya tidak bisa membantu menghindari kewajiban pembayaran. Kalau sedang kesulitan bayar, saya bisa bantu catat kendala dan ajukan callback resmi.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Ya sudah, catat kendalaku.

turns.speaker: bot_expected
turns.text: Baik, saya catat kendala pembayaran dan arahkan ke tim terkait untuk opsi bantuan yang sesuai ketentuan.
